nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John De Upton was born in 1219, in Upton Magna, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hamelin De Upton, was 57 and his mother, Miss Trelaske, was 58. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Elizabeth Upton. He died in 1329, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 110.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Elizabeth Upton. Il est décédé en 1329, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 110 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: John De Upton(이)가 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamelin De Upton(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Miss Trelaske(은)는 58세였다. 그는 Mrs. Elizabeth Upton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1329년 영국 잉글랜드에서 110세의 나이로 사망했다.
